insights.headline: Paid channels take most spend but several fall below target.
insights.action: Review Google Search, Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn, and Programmatic Display before adding budget.

insights.headline: Owned and partner channels scale efficiently.
insights.action: Scale Direct, Email, Organic Search, and Referral Partners while monitoring marginal CAC.

insights.headline: Campaign ranking turns KPI gaps into next-month budget choices.
insights.action: Use the top/bottom campaign views to move spend without debating every campaign manually.
